title: Container Report - Week 39
summary:
Main
COSCO has announced this week they will not move away from services into the USA despite the incoming USTR port charges, they have pledged to not pass on these extra costs to customers, but as time goes on the fees will increase each year, so we shall have to see. The Port of Los Angeles announced record throughput in July and August this year, but expects volumes will not hit these levels anytime soon with the incoming USTR charges. The key route FBX01 (China/East Asia - USA West Coast declined $497 week on week and is $331 down on the start of the month, FBX01 has been fairly range bound in September.
